name: Delete Confirmation Modal
selectionSummary:
Component: Modal / Confirm Delete (480×240)

Layers:
- Icon: Warning triangle (red, 32×32)
- Heading: 'Delete this item?'
- Body: 'This action cannot be undone. The item and all its data will be permanently removed.'
- Button: 'Cancel' (ghost, left)
- Button: 'Delete' (destructive red, right)

State: modal open, no input focused.
notes: Selection-only (no vision). Tests destructive action copy and button labelling.
